executiveSummary: The TRIRIGA server logs suffer from severe CPU starvation. High thread contention (88.5%) is indicated.

detectedAnomalies.title: Critical System Constraint (High CPU)
detectedAnomalies.description: Sustained high CPU usage of 88.5% identified in file. Thread pool exhaustion imminent.

detectedAnomalies.title: Potential JVM Memory Leak
detectedAnomalies.description: Gradual, non-recovering Heap memory identified. OutOfMemory exceptions detected 4482 times.

detectedAnomalies.title: Cache Storm Event Detected
detectedAnomalies.description: The Cache Miss Ratio is 28.1% (Threshold: 15.0%). Higher cache misses force excessive roundtrips to the DB for metadata.

detectedAnomalies.title: Workflow Failure Operational Risk
detectedAnomalies.description: Workflow Failure Rate is 4.5%, exceeding the 2.0% operational threshold. High probability of lock contention.

rca:
### Root Cause Analysis: CPU Starvation

1. **Thread Saturation**: The log reveals a sudden surge of HTTP connector threads executing long-running business intelligence queries.
2. **Slow Query Contention**: Lack of appropriate compound indices on custom business objects causes sequential table scans, utilizing over 90% of DB CPU.

recommendations.title: Thread Pool Scaling & Keep-Alive Settings
recommendations.description: Scale maximum WebSphere/WebLogic application server thread pools and optimize TRIRIGA connection pool. Set Keep-Alive limits correctly in TRIRIGAWEB.properties.

recommendations.title: JVM Garbage Collection Tuning & Heap Dump Analysis
recommendations.description: Configure the JVM to use G1GC garbage collector with optimized pause time targets and generate a heap dump upon OutOfMemory exception for Eclipse Memory Analyzer (MAT).

recommendations.title: TRIRIGA Object Cache Adjustments
recommendations.description: Increase the TRIRIGA Object Cache limits in custom.properties to store frequently hit records (such as Classifications, GUI, and Web Page metadata).

recommendations.title: Workflow Lock Contention & Business Object Checks
recommendations.description: Run diagnostic queries to check for locked objects in the workflow queue. Identify workflows with 'Start No Import' or stuck 'In Progress' states.
recommendations.codeSnippet:
-- Run on TRIRIGA Database (PostgreSQL/Oracle/MSSQL)
SELECT EVENT_ID, EVENT_NAME, WF_STATUS, CREATED_DATE 
FROM WF_EVENT_HISTORY 
WHERE WF_STATUS = 'LOCKED' OR WF_STATUS = 'FAILED';
